data.content: Now I'll inject `TimeProvider` and replace all `DateTime.UtcNow` usages:

diff --git a/tmp/sv-3784149cc64e4b29a9e513248b5a2d92/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs b/tmp/sv-3784149cc64e4b29a9e513248b5a2d92/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs

data.content:
Done. All four `DateTime.UtcNow` calls in `CouponService.cs` are now using the injected `TimeProvider`. Changes made:

1. Added `TimeProvider _timeProvider` field
2. Injected it via the constructor
3. Replaced all `DateTime.UtcNow` → `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime`

`AuditLogger.cs` was left untouched. Since `TimeProvider` is already in your DI container, the service will resolve automatically.
